kw.msg: Fills the text 'tomsmith' in the given field.

kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: ValueError: Argument 'browser' got value 'chrome' that cannot be converted to SupportedBrowsers: SupportedBrowsers does not have member 'chrome'. Available: 'chromium', 'firefox' and 'webkit'
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance. Use this keyword for quick experiments or debugging sessions.
